strengths: Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on engagement with agentic workflow tooling directly relevant to the role

Deep distributed-systems and high-throughput backend expertise from Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency async services) plus fintech exposure at RIDE Capital reshaping German investment infrastructure

Founder of GISCollective, an event-driven platform deployed on Kubernetes — proving end-to-end architectural ownership, long-term product stewardship, and ability to ship production systems independently
concerns: Career history is primarily individual-contributor and staff-level engineering rather than executive leadership of 10–30+ person organizations
Multi-agent AI work appears recent and infrastructure/tooling-focused rather than operating production agent systems making financial decisions
Fintech experience is meaningful but adjacent (investment platform, pricing optimization) rather than credit-risk or trade-decisioning systems

key_factors.factor: Hands-on agentic AI and MCP infrastructure work
Distributed systems and low-latency backend depth
Fintech and regulated-environment exposure (RIDE Capital, Optilyz pricing)

response.justification: Bogdan combines current, hands-on agentic AI infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agent frameworks at re:cinq) with rare distributed-systems pedigree — building low-latency micro-services handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby — and direct fintech exposure at RIDE Capital, where he applied disciplined engineering practices (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD) to reshape German investment infrastructure. As founder of GISCollective, he has demonstrated end-to-end architectural ownership of an event-driven, Kubernetes-deployed platform, and his consistent emphasis on testability, observability, and craftsmanship maps cleanly to the role's requirements for auditable, evaluation-rich agent systems. His polyglot range, teaching/workshop track record, and ability to mentor through Code Katas and Refactoring Dojos position him well to build the senior technical-leadership layer the company needs.
